title: Governed work objects foundation
summary: Define the governed work object contract layer for R3.

lineage.rationale: Open the R3 foundation project directly from the bounded milestone plan.

relationships.notes: The R3 foundation extends the closed-out R2 proof boundary.

evidence.summary: The R3 milestone brief authorizes this project boundary.
The closed-out proof boundary defines the starting substrate.

audit.notes: Project boundary reviewed against active milestone truth.

scope_summary: Create canonical work object contracts and invariants without starting storage or flow work.
goals: Define durable contracts for Project, Milestone, Task, and Bug.
Keep the foundation bounded to R3-002.
acceptance_criteria: Contracts exist for all four governed work objects.
Invariant rules are explicit and replayable.
